A COLLABORATION BETWEEN
×

Wearable Verse

THE ATTICUS ACCESSIBLE COLLECTION · CONCEPT DECK · JULY 2026

His most loved poems, turned into small pieces of jewelry that are easy to gift and easy to wear. Eight poem concepts, twenty design options, presented as working sketches.

PREPARED BY DO AMORE FOR THE ATTICUS TEAM
THE IDEA · WHY NOW

A New Price Chapter, Together

  • Your audience is big, young, and gift driven. They deserve a way into the collab at a giftable price.
  • Poems can sit directly on the pieces, or live in them as quiet symbols. Both are in here.
  • A design framework for Atticus jewelry, so everything we make together feels like the brand.
  • Built on your seven top performers, plus the September book moment. Each poem is explored across a few product options.
THE COLLAB TODAY
$780 – $2,980
Engagement rings and bands.
The poem is etched into each ring box.
THE ACCESSIBLE CAPSULE
$120 – $380
Sterling. Easy to gift,
easy to wear, easy to say yes to.
DESIGN FRAMEWORK · PART I

The Four Atticus Codes

Ink & Verse
The poem is the ornament. Hand engraved script, engraved lettering, and micro engraving used as surface texture.
Night Sky
Stars, galaxies, constellations. Your most loved imagery. Oxidized dark silver for the night, small lab grown stones only where the poem calls for a star.
Wild & Imperfect
Hand finished details, deliberate asymmetry, one element that breaks the pattern. It should read like handwriting, not typesetting.
Love from the Shadows
Atticus writes behind a mask, so every piece keeps a secret. Interior engravings, hidden reverse faces, verses only the wearer knows about.
TWO-TONE RESTRAINT · MATTE AND OXIDIZED FINISHES · EVERY PIECE CARRIES ITS VERSE · BOXED WITH ITS POEM CARD · UNISEX BY DEFAULT
DESIGN FRAMEWORK · PART II

Three Ways to Wear a Poem

❝
MODE I

Verse Direct

The line itself, engraved where people can read it. Or repeated until it becomes the texture of the metal.

A Thousand Times · Between Coffee & Sleep (coin edge) · Galaxies & Chaos (reverse)
✦
MODE II

The Symbol

The poem translated into one quiet motif. A single oxidized link, a wobbly first stroke, a diving star. People who know the poem will recognize it. Everyone else just sees a nice piece.

The Different Link · The First Stroke · The Star Chaser · The December Dip
❦
MODE III

The Hidden Verse

The line hidden against the skin. Locket pages, ring interiors, the back of a disc. A secret between Atticus and the wearer.

The Poet's Locket · The Star Chaser (interior) · The Brave Bar (reverse)
Our fine collection already etches each poem into its ring box. This capsule moves the poem from the box onto the piece itself.
MATERIALS & PRICE ARCHITECTURE

Honest Materials, Giftable Prices

Recycled sterling 925The core metal across the line.
Oxidized finishesThe night sky surfaces the poems ask for.
Lab grown diamondsSmall stones, used only where the poem calls for a star.
EngravingThe signature craft. Every verse is carried on or in the piece.
ENTRY
A Thousand Times band · The December Dip charm · The Different Link necklace
CORE
The Brave Bar pendant · The Star Chaser signet · Between Coffee & Sleep coin
SIGNATURE
Galaxies & Chaos pendant · The Poet's Locket
And the promise holds: every purchase funds clean water for one person, on the smallest piece the same as the largest.
01
CONCEPT NO. 01
"Your different was your beautiful all along"
ATTICUS
The Different Link

One link cast different. A single oxidized link on a silver chain, with the verse engraved on the clasp tag. The easiest gifting story in the line, in three items:

AThe Different Link · chain necklaceLEAD
BThe Different One · mismatched studs
CThe Different Link · chain bracelet
SHEET 01 · NECKLACE / MISMATCHED STUDS / BRACELET
02
CONCEPT NO. 02
"Be brave enough to be bad at something new"
ATTICUS
The First Stroke

One imperfect hand etched stroke, with the full verse engraved on the back. A natural for graduations and new chapters:

AThe Brave Bar · etched bar pendant, verse on backLEAD
BThe Unfinished Ring · open band, raw ends
SHEET 02 · BAR PENDANT / OPEN RING
03
CONCEPT NO. 03 · LINE HERO
"She had galaxies in her mind and chaos in her heart"
ATTICUS
Galaxies & Chaos

Oxidized night sky silver with star set lab diamonds. The rest of the line is engraved on the reverse. Your most tattooed verse, in three items:

AGalaxies & Chaos · disc pendant, 5 stones, verse on reverseLEAD
BThe Galaxy Dome · oxidized ring, 3 stones
CThe Constellation Climber · earrings, 4 stones
SHEET 03 · DISC PENDANT / DOME RING / EAR CLIMBERS
04
CONCEPT NO. 04
"Chase your stars fool, life is short"
ATTICUS
The Star Chaser

A shooting star with a gilded tail. Inside, where only the wearer knows, it says life is short. Unisex, and works as a pinky ring:

AThe Star Chaser · signet, tail wrapping the bandLEAD
BThe Chase · shooting-star pendant
CThe Star Threaders · chain earrings, star ends
SHEET 04 · SIGNET / STAR PENDANT / THREADERS
05
CONCEPT NO. 05
"You are enough, a thousand times enough"
ATTICUS
A Thousand Times

The word enough micro engraved until it becomes the texture of the metal. A shimmer from a distance, an affirmation up close. The entry point of the line, two ways:

AA Thousand Times · stacking bandLEAD
BThe Enough Tag · micro-script tag pendant
SHEET 05 · BAND / TAG PENDANT
06
CONCEPT NO. 06
"I love you in that place between coffee and sleep"
ATTICUS
Between Coffee & Sleep

Night on one side, morning on the other. Oxidized moon, Polished sunrise, verse around the edge. Built for couples gifting, two ways:

ABetween Coffee & Sleep · reversible coin, verse on edgeLEAD
BSun & Moon · mismatched studs
SHEET 06 · REVERSIBLE COIN / SUN-MOON STUDS
07
CONCEPT NO. 07
"Take my soul, but make good poetry of it"
ATTICUS
The Poet's Locket

The writing life, worn. A locket that opens like a book, and a typewriter key. Ships with the poem inside and can be personalized with the wearer's own words:

AThe Poet's Locket · book-style locket, engravable plateLEAD
BThe Typewriter Key · key pendant, engraved initial
SHEET 07 · LOCKET / TYPEWRITER KEY
08
CONCEPT NO. 08 · THE SEPTEMBER MOMENT
Skinny Dipping in December. Your new book, out September.
THE LAUNCH HOOK
The December Dip
AThe December Dip · star-and-ripple charm, any chainLEAD
BThe Waterline · ring, star dipping into engraved wave
CThe Splash Huggies · hoops with star and droplet
CHAPTER ONE · SEPTEMBER

Launch with the book

2–3 hero pieces plus a book and charm gift set, timed to release week and tour press. The capsule launches inside a PR moment that already exists.

CHAPTER TWO · HOLIDAY

Full capsule for gifting season

The remaining pieces land for holiday, when giftable jewelry at this price does its best work. September sell through picks the heroes.

SHEET 08 · CHARM / WATERLINE RING / SPLASH HUGGIES
THE LINE AT A GLANCE

Eight Poems, Twenty Designs

NO.LEAD PIECE (A)VERSEALTERNATES (B / C)

Lead option shown for each poem. Alternates listed with each option.
NEXT STEPS

From Sketch to Sample

  1. 01
    Tell us what feels right
    20 designs, with a lead and alternates for each verse. Pick one option per poem, or kill a poem. Our suggested September heroes: Galaxies & Chaos, A Thousand Times, The December Dip.
  2. 02
    We develop CADs and engraving proofs
    About 2 weeks from your picks, with a proof for every verse treatment.
  3. 03
    First samples for review
    About 4–5 weeks after CAD approval, in time for the September window.
  4. 04
    Lock chapter one, plan chapter two
    September pieces confirmed, and the rest of the capsule lands for holiday.
"Anyone can buy jewelry, but what makes it more special is adding the thought and care and narrative of why we designed these pieces the way that we did."
ATTICUS, ON THE COLLABORATION · JCK, 2024
CONCEPT DECK DO AMORE × ATTICUS 01 / 15
